name: TikTok Repost Skill — SteeleZone
description: Governed 4-step dispatch skill for SteeleZone daily TikTok reposts. Reads post_schedule.csv, runs pre-dispatch audit, dispatches to content__tiktok_repost_daily n8n endpoint, writes structured dispatch report. Daily human review gate required before dispatch fires. No production manifest or governance file may be modified.

schedule_source.description: Path to the post schedule file. Must be config/post_schedule.csv — no external or dynamic sources permitted.

target_account.description: TikTok repost account to target. Enum-locked to steelezone_repost — Account A (@the-steele-zone) cannot be targeted via this skill.

trigger_reason.description: Why this repost is being triggered. Non-empty; logged for full audit trail.

audit_pre_check_passed.description: true if all 7 pre-dispatch audit gates passed.

report_path.description: Path to dispatch summary written to reports/.

steps.name: Validate post schedule file
steps.description: Repo Agent reads config/post_schedule.csv and validates: file exists, required columns present (post_id, video_id, platform, brand, scheduled_date, time_slot), no PII patterns in any cell, at least one row with platform=tiktok_repost for today's date. Halts if schedule is missing or malformed.

safety.description: Pure read-only schedule validation. Any missing file, malformed schema, or PII detection halts the run immediately.

steps.name: Pre-dispatch audit: validate endpoint, payload, PII, and auth
steps.description: Audit Agent runs audit_n8n_payload skill: validates logical name content__tiktok_repost_daily is in allowlist, URL is HTTPS on approved host, payload keys match allowlist, no PII in values, auth env var N8N_WEBHOOK_TOKEN_TIKTOK is set. Any failure is a GovernanceError — step 3 dispatch never runs.

safety.description: Audit only — no HTTP calls. Writes audit result to logs/ and reports/. Any gate failure halts dispatch.

steps.name: Dispatch: POST to content__tiktok_repost_daily n8n endpoint
steps.description: Workflow Agent calls dispatch_n8n_workflow skill. Only executes if audit_pre_check_passed=true from step 2. HTTPS POST to content__tiktok_repost_daily with token from N8N_WEBHOOK_TOKEN_TIKTOK env var. Logs n8n host and HTTP status code only — no full URL path, no token, no response body.

safety.description: Dispatch step. Requires human confirmation of the daily repost queue before firing (adult-content platform risk). Only http_post_n8n is permitted — not network_calls.

steps.name: Report: write dispatch summary to reports/ and logs/workflows/
steps.description: Reporting Agent calls summarize_n8n_dispatch skill. Writes human-readable summary: logical name, category, n8n host (not full URL), HTTP status code, audit verdict, run ID. Never logs full URL path, token, raw response body, or PII.

safety.description: Writes only to logs/workflows/ and reports/. No manifest, config, or governance files may be modified.
